name: Pininfarina S.p.A.
summary: Pininfarina S.p.A., together with its subsidiaries, designs, manufactures, and sells spare parts for cars in Italy, Germany, China, and the United States. The company operates through Design and Engineering segments. It also provides vehicles; and automotive engineering, bespoke, and wind tunnel services. Pininfarina S.p.A. primarily serves architecture, automotive, aviation, consumer electronics, vehicle production, furniture and home appliance, industrial and vending machine, lifestyle product, nautical, retail, and transportation industries. The company was founded in 1930 and is headquartered in Cambiano, Italy. Pininfarina S.p.A. is a subsidiary of PF Holdings BV.
